sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64989" key="mara\n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μαρὰν ἀθά</orth>, Syriac phrase, <sense id="n64989.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὁ Κύριος ἥκει</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg007.perseus-grc1:16:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">1 Ep.Cor.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
